## What changed

Describe the change and the reader problem it solves.

## Evidence

List fixtures, good-writing controls, manual review, and context-budget impact where applicable.

## Checklist

- [ ] I preserved meaning and factual detail.
- [ ] I added or updated relevant evaluation fixtures.
- [ ] I checked clean human writing for regressions.
- [ ] I did not add detector-evasion framing or runtime dependencies.
